scripts.build: export PATH="/tmp:$PATH" && npm run ensure:oracle-contract && npm run generate:oracle-binding && npm run build:oracle && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.build:oracle: cd packages/oracle && npm install && npm run build && cd ../..
scripts.generate:oracle-binding: mkdir -p packages/oracle && (which stellar > /dev/null 2>&1 && stellar contract bindings typescript --network testnet --contract-id CCF2U62KGK7ZSS6G6SJLR43JZXCDUC4VWW3SAIVWN5OVJL3AU7ILOYZ2 --output-dir ./packages/oracle --overwrite || echo 'Warning: Could not generate oracle binding. Using existing binding if available.')
scripts.ensure:oracle-contract: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const filePath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'src/contracts/oracle.ts'); if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) { fs.writeFileSync(filePath, \"import * as Client from 'oracle';\\nimport { rpcUrl, networkPassphrase } from './util';\\n\\nexport default new Client.Client({\\n  networkPassphrase: networkPassphrase,\\n  contractId: Client.networks.testnet.contractId,\\n  rpcUrl,\\n  allowHttp: true,\\n  publicKey: undefined,\\n});\\n\", 'utf8'); console.log('Created src/contracts/oracle.ts'); }"
scripts.vercel:install: bash -c 'set -e; mkdir -p packages/oracle; npm run ensure:oracle-contract; npm run generate:oracle-binding || echo "Warning: Stellar CLI failed, using existing bindings"; if [ ! -f "packages/oracle/src/index.ts" ]; then echo "Error: No oracle bindings found at packages/oracle/src/index.ts. Please commit generated bindings."; exit 1; fi; cd packages/oracle; npm install; npm run build; cd ../..; npm install'
